title: Forward Deployed Integration Engineer, Professional Services

tailored_resume.name: Sai Manikanta Karnati
tailored_resume.summary: Deployed Integration Engineer with 5+ years building financial infrastructure, integrations, and APIs across Java, Python, SQL, and Go. Combines deep technical expertise in integration engineering, CI/CD, and observability dashboards with strategic technical leadership, partnering with technical teams and enterprises to deliver reliable, high-throughput payments and product features serving thousands of users.

experience.title: Software Engineer
bullets: Architected service-oriented financial infrastructure using Java Spring Boot and Python microservices, enabling independent deployments across technical teams.
Engineered high-throughput event-driven integrations with DynamoDB Streams, Node.js Lambda, and SNS/SQS, ensuring 99.99% reliability for payments workloads.
Built CI/CD pipelines and automation scripts that cut manual operational effort by ~40% and improved processing efficiency for backend workflows.
Optimized complex SQL queries, stored procedures, and data models across relational and NoSQL databases, improving transaction performance by 35%.
Developed REST and GraphQL APIs and observability dashboards in Splunk and Spring Boot Actuator, reducing production issue resolution time by 40%.
Led strategic technical conversations with enterprise stakeholders, providing deep technical expertise to ship product features for thousands of users.

experience.title: Associate Software Engineer
bullets: Developed scalable backend integrations in Java Spring Boot, Python, Node.js, and Go, delivering RESTful APIs and microservices for enterprise clients.
Implemented event-driven architecture with Apache Kafka, reducing inter-service dependency failures by 35% across distributed financial systems.
Designed and optimized SQL queries, joins, views, and stored procedures, improving API response times by 35%.
Built CI/CD deployment efficiency by containerizing applications with Docker and Kubernetes and provisioning AWS/GCP infrastructure via Terraform.
Created and documented RESTful APIs with Swagger/OpenAPI, enforcing versioning and writing technical specs that aligned technical teams.
Integrated OAuth2, JWT, and Spring Security and applied Redis caching, improving secure throughput under heavy load by ~30%.

experience.title: Engineer Trainee
bullets: Developed enterprise applications using Angular frontends and Python/Java backend services for transactional business systems.
Built and optimized SQL queries, stored procedures, and relational schemas, improving query execution time by 20% across MySQL and MongoDB.
Wrote reusable code and RESTful APIs documented with Swagger/OpenAPI, supporting clean product feature integrations for end users.
Implemented API security using OAuth2 and Spring Security, plus rate limiting and gateway protections for backend services.
Increased unit test coverage to 95% using JUnit and Python test automation, raising release reliability across CI/CD pipelines.
Engineered monitoring dashboards to surface performance metrics, providing technical expertise that accelerated debugging.

education.degree: Master of Science in Computer Science
education.institution: University of North Carolina at Charlotte

changes: Reconstructed fragmented job entries into three clean roles (Vanguard, Xebia x2) with correct titles, companies, and dates preserved from the input.
Added a target-title summary leading with 'Deployed Integration Engineer' and key required skills.

Wove required skills (Java, SQL, Go, C, C++, CI/CD, dashboards, writing/code) and domain keywords (integration engineering, financial infrastructure, payments, enterprises, users, product feature, technical teams, deep technical expertise) into experience bullets.
Converted weak/duplicate fragments into strong action-verb XYZ bullets with metrics.
Cleaned and de-duplicated the skills list to focused industry-standard names.
ESTIMATED METRICS to confirm: ~40% automation effort reduction, ~30% secured throughput improvement, and the Go/C/C++ usage — verify these reflect your actual work before submitting.
Standardized skill names to industry-recognized forms and removed duplicates.
